summary: Comprehensive testing of GLID Procurement Lead Manager completed successfully. All backend APIs working perfectly (18/18 tests passed). Frontend UI testing shows excellent functionality with landing page, buyer/seller dashboards, RFQ creation, messaging, and workspace features all operational.

minor_issues.issue: View switcher behavior may not navigate to landing page as expected when switching between Buyer/Seller views

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: All 18 API endpoints working (GLIDs, dashboards, RFQs, actions, messages, CSV export)
✅ Landing page with role selection and GLID dropdown
✅ Buyer Dashboard with KPIs, pipeline chart, RFQ table
✅ Create RFQ modal with form validation and submission
✅ RFQ Workspace with details, stage flow, messaging
✅ Seller Dashboard with KPIs and incoming RFQs
✅ Seller actions (Send Quote, Counter Offer) in RFQ Workspace
✅ Message thread functionality in RFQ Workspace
✅ Responsive UI with proper data-testid attributes

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All major functionality working, 1 minor issue with view switcher)
